title: THORChain - REKT
relevance_summary: Cross-chain bridge exploit using an over-ride loop vulnerability

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates msg.value within a loop involving vaultTransferEvent calls

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that manipulates msg.value within a loop involving vaultTransferEvent calls
summary: THORChain fell victim to a cross-chain bridge exploit due to an over-ride loop vulnerability in the ETH Bifrost code. The exploit drained liquidity in various coins. A secure fix involves making the over-ride only happen if it's a vaultTransferEvent.
